overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a lakeside dirt path at night during a storm, crossing a stone bridge, and continuing through a dense forest while holding a torch that casts dynamic shadows.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the lakeside path holding a torch, approaching a stone bridge in the distance

entered.detail: dark water body visible to the left of the path reflecting storm clouds
dark turbulent clouds covering the night sky
silhouetted tree line visible across the lake
tall grass and vegetation lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wide dirt path beside a lake at night during a storm. The torch illuminates the path ahead while dark clouds fill the sky. The shoreline is lined with grass and rocks, and a distant forest is visible across the water.

events.description: character steps onto stone bridge with raised stone parapets on both sides

agents.ego_description: crossing the stone bridge with torch held high, casting shadows on the stone railings

entered.detail: stone parapet walls on both sides of the bridge
cobblestone surface of the bridge with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow stone bridge with high parapets. Geralt walks across the cobblestone surface as water flows beneath. The enclosed bridge structure frames the view ahead toward the forest exit.

events.description: NPC in red clothing becomes visible standing on the left side of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path past a wooden fence, approaching and passing a stationary figure

notable_agents.action: standing still on the left side of the path facing away from the camera

entered.detail: rustic wooden picket fence lining the right side of the path
leafless dead branches and twigs on the left verge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the path continues through a wooded area with a wooden fence on the right. An NPC in red clothing stands on the left side of the path. The lake remains visible in the distance to the left as the character passes the stationary figure.

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the dense forest, torchlight illuminating tree trunks and undergrowth

entered.detail: tall pine and deciduous trees forming a dense canopy overhead
massive tree trunk with detailed bark texture passing by on the left

segments.scene_description: The path enters a densely forested area where tall trees block most of the sky. The torch casts dramatic shadows on the large tree trunks and forest floor. The lake is no longer visible as the character proceeds deeper into the woods along the winding dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, storm-swept lakeside path into the oppressive enclosure of a dense forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path beside a lake under dark, stormy clouds, with a torch illuminating the rocky shoreline. As the path narrows, the scene transitions onto a cobblestone bridge with high parapets that frames the view toward the tree line. The camera then follows the character as he exits the bridge and passes a figure in red clothing beside a wooden fence, while the lake gradually recedes into the distance. Finally, the path winds deep into a thick woodland where towering trees block the sky and the torch casts dramatic shadows across the forest floor.
